flashcards.back: A Spark module for structured data processing that provides DataFrame API and SQL query capabilities
Spark SQL's query optimization framework that transforms logical plans into optimized physical plans
DataFrame has schema and optimized execution, while RDD is lower-level with no built-in optimization
The entry point for Spark SQL functionality, replacing SQLContext and HiveContext in Spark 2.0+
An optimization technique where filters are applied at the data source level to reduce data reading
